folderDrop.dialog.title: Import Folder
folderDrop.dialog.dropLabel: Drag and drop a folder here from your desktop
folderDrop.error.noItems: No items detected in the drop.
folderDrop.error.noFolders: Please drop at least one folder.
folderDrop.error.tooManyFiles: Too many files ({0}). Maximum allowed is {1}.
folderDrop.error.totalSizeTooLarge: Total size ({0}) exceeds the maximum allowed ({1}).
folderDrop.error.invalidConfig: Invalid folder drop configuration. Please contact your administrator.
folderDrop.warning.oneDuplicate: This item already exists at this location, see the warning below.
folderDrop.warning.duplicates: The following item(s) already exist at this location: {0}.
folderDrop.warning.duplicates.hint: New documents will be created with the same title, which may appear as duplicates.
